rationale: Educ. Code §11.1515 governs school board oversight of academic achievement and strategic leadership. It contains no tax, homestead, or revenue provisions, so it does not conflict with the proposed homestead exemption increase.
quote: The board of trustees of an independent school district or the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school shall provide oversight regarding student academic achievement and strategic leadership for maximizing student performance.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule addresses academic oversight, not taxation or homestead exemptions.
